BURN.competition: Best 45-sec ski erg effort in Block A

BURN.name: Death Ride
BURN.competition: Assault bike — total calories across all 8 rounds of 20 sec

BURN.name: Master Leo
BURN.competition: Assault Bike — cumulative cals across all 4 rounds

BURN.name: Pair & Burn
BURN.competition: Assault bike — head to head, highest cals in 30 sec across 3 rounds

BURN.name: Red Line
BURN.competition: 4-min max cals — Row / Ski / Bike (rotates each time session runs)

BURN.name: The Incinerator
BURN.competition: Max calories on the ski erg (runs all 3 laps — cumulative total)

BURN.name: The Ladder
BURN.competition: DB Thruster — max reps in Round 5 (note weight used)

STRONG.name: Block & Sled
STRONG.competition: Heaviest sled load sustained non-stop for 4 minutes. Record the weight.

STRONG.name: Heavy Metal
STRONG.competition: KB deadlift — 5-rep max weight (heaviest weight lifted for 5 clean reps)

STRONG.name: Power Pairs
STRONG.competition: Farmer's carry — max distance in 40 sec (record metres)

STRONG.name: Slow Burn
STRONG.competition: Goblet squat — max quality reps in 45 sec at 3-1-3 tempo

STRONG.competition: KB Deadlift — Max Reps at chosen weight

STRONG.competition: KB Deadlift — Max Reps at chosen weight

STRONG.competition: KB Deadlift — Max Reps at chosen weight

STRONG.name: The Builder
STRONG.competition: KB deadlift — max reps in 45 sec

HYBRID.name: Block & Burn
HYBRID.competition: Highest individual machine cals in any single 4-min block — write all three rounds on the board

HYBRID.name: Circuit Breaker
HYBRID.competition: KB American swing — max reps per minute, tracked across all 6 rounds

HYBRID.name: Functional Beast
HYBRID.competition: Assault bike — max cals at Couplet 3, combined across both rounds

HYBRID.name: Halo
HYBRID.competition: DB bent-over row — max reps per lap, total across both laps

HYBRID.name: Held
HYBRID.competition: Team max cals per block. Session total across all 3 blocks.

HYBRID.name: Pairs & Cals
HYBRID.competition: Highest combined team machine cals across all 3 stations

HYBRID.name: The Accumulator
HYBRID.competition: Cumulative machine cals across all rounds — ski + bike + row. Beat your previous session total.

HYBRID.name: The Chipper
HYBRID.competition: — divide the work however you want, clock stops when all reps are done

HYBRID.name: The Countdown
HYBRID.competition: Individual — track your own cals/reps per lap. Score DROPS as intervals shorten, but effort should RISE. Finisher = team max cals.

HYBRID.name: The Machine
HYBRID.competition: Sled push — max distance per lap, total across both laps

HYBRID.name: The Switch
HYBRID.competition: Individual total cals (from both machine circuits) — written on whiteboard after each switch

HYBRID.name: Triple Hit
HYBRID.competition: Sled push — max distance in 40 seconds
